# Module Name

## Purpose

What this module exists to do.

## Ownership Boundary

What this module owns, and what it must not own.

## Public Surface

Stable APIs, schemas, commands, packages, or entrypoints exposed to other modules.

## Dependencies

Allowed dependencies and forbidden dependencies.

## Generated Artifacts

List generated files, source of truth, generator command, and whether generated output may be edited by humans.

## Related Context

- Current contracts:
- ADRs:
- RFCs:
- Parent context:

## Notes for Future Agents

Local facts that help an agent work in this module without loading unrelated parts of the repository.
